tests_run: none expected; independent CSV reconciliation and raw spot checks performed

key_evidence.reconciliation_result: 0 duplicate score keys; 0 top5 score-copy mismatches; 0 archived score numeric/name mismatches; 0 mapping/coverage key deltas; 0 coverage identity/status mismatches

outcome_source_agreement.verdict: official generated/report or rule-kinematic coordination score; expert-rated coordination not proven
outcome_source_agreement.pdf_evidence: Beijing Panda and Shanghai WUT_FSD diagnosis PDFs show page-1 0-100 dimensions including traffic coordination, and later traffic-coordination sections decompose it into background-traffic safety/efficiency/comfort components with affected-background-traffic counts.
outcome_source_agreement.sql_evidence: tjjhs_referee_scoring has user_id/user_name, score_point1 comfort, and score_point2 system score; it does not expose a rater-level coordination rubric or direct coordination rating field.
outcome_source_agreement.rubric_search: No standalone rubric/judge instruction file found by local filename search for rubric, rating, score, rule, judge, manual, guideline, or standard terms under data/onsite_competition.

beijing_shanghai_agreement.same_numeric_scale: supported: both area PDFs and score CSVs use six 0-100 dimensions including coordination
beijing_shanghai_agreement.same_report_schema: partially supported: shared diagnosis labels and coordination subsection structure were observed in Beijing and Shanghai PDFs
beijing_shanghai_agreement.same_judges: not supported: SQL examples show area-specific judge names, e.g. Tongji vs Tongzhou following-car judges
beijing_shanghai_agreement.same_formal_rubric: not established: no formal rubric/rules document found

spec_deviations: Did not update main_workflow.log or START_HERE.md because task WRITE_SCOPE allowed only files under G1R plus append-only META/artifact_index.csv.
One preliminary reconciliation print command failed due JSON serialization of tuple keys; it made no file changes and was rerun with stringified keys.
One preliminary artifact-writer command failed on relative path normalization before writing files; it made no file changes and was rerun with normalized paths.
